title: pourthiaea formosana
intro: Pourthiaea formosana, also known as Formosa plum or Taiwan plum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Anacardiaceae. It is a deciduous tree native to Taiwan, and its bark, leaves, and roots have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pourthiaea formosana include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach pain. Pourthiaea formosana can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or ointment, and its herbal preparations are often used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory and gastrointestinal issues.
